meta.notes: Full pipeline run: Stages 0-4 completed. Stage 4.5 (lipsync) not reached — subagent timed out after video assembly. 2/10 keyframes failed (shot_07, shot_08 — ghost encounter shots). Kling rendered from 8 available keyframes, 4 batches all succeeded. Music generated (MiniMax). No lipsync/audio mix. CDN URL is final_video_only.mp4 (no music mix). Skill installed from git feat/short-film branch (not CMS hub). Token extraction from main session JSONL within benchmark window.

test_input.name: creative-brief-horror
test_input.description: Horror/thriller creative brief: Ji-yeon (22yo Korean exchange student) discovers ghost in abandoned university library. 10 shots, portrait 9:16, cold noir B&W with amber highlights.

task.name: short-film
task.purpose: Generate a complete ~60s horror short film from a 7-question creative brief: plan, assets, keyframes, music, Kling video (4 batches)
task.expected_output: Portrait 9:16 MP4 (~60s) with Kling-generated video, per-shot SFX audio, background horror score, and lipsync for dialogue shot, uploaded to CDN

install.notes: Skill installed from git (feat/short-film branch via PAT), not CMS hub. No timing applicable.

asset_acquisition.notes: No test input to download — input is a text creative brief only.

steps.name: init
steps.notes: Stage 0: project directory + project.json. Estimated from script execution time.

steps.name: plan
steps.notes: Stage 1: LLM writes story bible (logline, worldview, 2 characters, 3 scenes, 10 shots) via write_plan(). Includes subagent spawn + LLM plan generation.

steps.name: assets_gemini
steps.notes: Stage 2: Gemini generated 2 character portraits + 3 scene images in parallel. 08:24:35 to 08:26:12. All 5 assets succeeded.

steps.name: keyframes_gemini
steps.notes: Stage 3: 10 keyframe calls to Gemini flash image preview. 8/10 succeeded (shot_07 and shot_08 failed — ghost encounter shots likely due to horror/disturbing content filtering). Grid composed at 08:35:25.

steps.name: music_minimax
steps.notes: Stage 3.6: MiniMax Music generated horror/suspense background score. background_music.mp3 (659KB). 08:35:25 to 08:36:04. Unusually fast — possibly short track generation.

steps.name: video_kling
steps.notes: Stage 4: Kling v3 omni multi-shot. 10 shots (8 with keyframes) → 4 batches. Submitted 08:36:45Z. All 4 batches completed by 08:46:11. Assembly + CDN upload by 08:47:33.

substeps.name: kling_download_assemble
substeps.notes: Download 4 batch MP4s, normalize, ffmpeg concat, CDN upload. 08:46:11 to 08:47:33 = 82s

steps.name: lipsync_mix
steps.notes: Stage 4.5: NOT RUN — subagent hit timeout before reaching lipsync stage. No TTS, no fal lipsync, no music mix. final_video_only.mp4 has no background score.

execution.notes: Wall 08:22:05 to 08:47:37 = 1532s. tool_calls_s estimated from file mtime deltas.

delivery.notes: CDN upload embedded in video.py (Stage 4 execution). output_url confirmed live.
